feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to identify the page of One Microsoft Azure application
entry.content: While trying to capture the elements of one Microsoft Azure Application through Recorded Mode the Extracted Automation piece while try to execute it on the runtime its not able to identify the page saying "Screen failed to appear in some defined time" and at the same point of time its creating multiple instances of the same page at console and we need to first remove this duplicate instance before run.

entry.title: Agent determination with SBPA
entry.content:
We have set up a three level workflow with the SBPA using Decision Tables (Decision tables give the Approver details for all the levels)

However since last few days it is behaving incorrectly. 

Issue : 

1st level is working as expected. However for the 2nd level instead of fetching approver details from decision table, it is taking SBPA initiator Id as the approver.

In the Monitor App we are able to see the correct approver is being fetched but the email / workflow is still triggered to SBPA initiator.

We checked all the mappings  and those are accurate.

entry.title: Dedicating specific SAPGUI instance for attended automation bot
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using attended automation for ad-hoc mass change entries using SAPGUI for SAP ECC. One of the issues we are having is that users cannot perform other SAP transactions in other screens or instances when the attended bot is running. Is there a way to bypass this?  Is there a way for an attended automation bot to only perform activities in a dedicated SAPGUI application instance and for the user to either work on existing SAP sessions or open new ones? 

Thanks,

Anand

entry.title: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination"
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have prepared a sample workflow in Build process to extract data from "CAPM" service via Action project. While running the workflow, I am getting an error message as "Failed to fetch configuration for destination '*******Service' during action execution: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination".'."

Kindly support us by resolving the issue.

entry.title: SAP RPA deployed project, triggered however hanging without an Error
entry.content:
Greetings,

Please advise on the below anomaly experienced:  

We have a Sinch RPA process which we have deployed,

  1. We trigger the process with a public form with below url:https://cotdevrpa.sap-process-automation.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/comsapspaprocessautomation.comsapspabpiprocessformtrigger/index.html?packageId=568e383c-b3ef-499c-99b9-3c14b571c0f8&packageVersionId=977bb240-174e-4c03-aa06-39af3a050e9f&formId=159e1925-51a0-456c-96f8-4e8c804fb8c0&processId=us10.4a015686trial.cotsinchrpa.sinchRPAProcess&skipStartEventWrap=false
  2. The process starts but never completes 
  3. from the monitoring tab we see the process running but doesn't complete and there are no errors 

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Build process automation subscription is not visible in service market place
entry.content: Hi All, today when I am trying to search for Sap build process automation subscription in market place it's not visible here. Please help me

entry.title: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access Screen
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation and in the first step , i have given a condition to determine whether the SAP Easy Access screen exists or not , if exists , the bot should run with that particular instance but in my case the bot is not able to recognize the Easy access screen and continue to run the automation with a new login.
But when i have already the same user open i.e. the credentials i used in the automation, the screen is getting identified.Please help me with this.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: How to use Patch Action in Build Process Automation (If-Match missing)
entry.content:
For SAP Build Process Automation, I'm trying to create a patch action to update an equipment using standard S4 API API_EQUIPMENT. I'm able to get an entityset and a single entity, but unable to use the patch. It comes back with the following error "Precondition required for entity CDS~A_EQUIPMENT (If-Match missing)". 

I understand that when I do a get single, I will receive an etag that I should be able to use for the patch. When making the update call, I don't see any option to add it. I tried adding it in the parameters as a custom entry, but it keeps returning with the same error. In the backend /iwfnd/gw_client TCODE I'm able to do this call as I can add the If-Match to the header.




Does anybody know how to incorporate the If-Match in a SAP Build Patch Action?

entry.title: Looking to execute HTTP Request using body in SPA
entry.content:
I'm trying to execute an HTTP POST request by passing in the JSON body with the correct parameters but I can't seem to find a tutorial that covers that.  I've tried using the API trigger but for some reason it's not working. I can't seem to figure out how to configure it properly.  The API I'm trying to connect to is already in the BTP Destinations and I can connect through Postman.

Does anybody happen to have either a tutorial or a sample project that would get me closer to being able to accomplish my goal?  Or maybe some guidance?  😊

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

I'm calling google firestore database API.

Also after login in web browser I can see all the content getting loaded successfully. But after logging in Mobile Device I'm getting logged in but not data getting displayed.

Refer below screen shot.

REST API

Data Variable Using : Bearer Token

This app works in web browser but not in SAP Build Preview App.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

Any idea then please let us know.

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: Getting status 404 during RUN TEST in Process Automation, all details are correct, What to do?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having trouble in understanding the reason why RUN TEST option in create tab is showing status 404 ? All the details entered by me is correct. I have gone through the entire set up 4-5 times yet not able to find the root cause. Set up of BTP definition is correct, I have checked it thoroughly.

Right now I am using SAP Build Process Automation in free plan and instance has been created using the standard plan. My set up in create tab is also correct.

Help me out here to resolve this problem.

entry.title: SAP SPA How to reference input parameter from Custom Script object in script?
entry.content:
I have partial success!  If I hard-code the period in the http request body in the custom script, it works.  What I need to be able to do is to reference the period in the Input parameter and set it inside the script.  Here is the script as I have it now.

let options = {
    'method': 'POST',
    'headers': { 'Content-type': 'application/json', 'accept': 'application/json' },
    'body': JSON.stringify({ Command: 'PipelineRun', StageType: 'CompensateAndPay',
    TraceLevel: 'status', ProcessingUnit: 'Unassigned', UserId: 'Administrator',
    RunMode: 'full', Period: { Name: 'June 2022' }, CalendarName: 'Main Monthly Calendar' }),
    'responseType': 'json', // parse the body of the result as a JSON object
    'resolveBodyOnly': true // get only the body of the response
};
return options;
 
There is an Input Parameter called PeriodName that I need to pass into the body for the Period Name (June 2022).
I've tried several things to reference the parameter but nothing seems to work.  And for some reason, I 

I'm not sure if I'm trying to do something that can't be done or if there is a work-around to get the HTTP Request syntax correct.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: Regarding SAP Build Apps Authentication issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am Sugandha. I have been using SAP Build Apps for quite some time and I am facing issues while configuring SAP BTP destination REST API integration. When I am testing the inputs, it gives me error 404. I have followed all the steps given in the below tutorial (attaching the link). - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html#23115af3-8c2e-487a-b50a-ecdc7c8a8fce (please refer to step no.5 for my query. I am stuck on that). As per the error, my definition ID is incorrect but I am just copy-pasting it.

Attaching an image for your refernce - 

 

Please guide me. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Customer has his BTP accounts setup model as a common CF sub account for multiple business units with no Integration Suite but serverless runtime extension center for now.

Customer would like to start using SAP Build Portfolio (Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Work zone Standard Edition) with the above setup and has the following queries - 

1) Backend SAP systems are SAP ECC6 EHP6 on-premise and S4 Hana on-premise in AWS and currently using BTP Serverless Runtime Extension Center for OData Provisioning - can the OData services from these on-premise systems be accessible in SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Workzone via extension center? or is exposing services via CAP or RAP the only alternative solution available?

2) With this single sub account setup how can it be ensured that from a security perspective only authorized user of a particular business unit can access an application apart from authorization setup in launchpad and as well as how can other business unit developers be not allowed to access other application code base.

Regards,

Vipin.

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: CSRF Token validation SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear Sap Community,

We want to call an OData service in our SAP backend via SAP Build Process Automation. However when trying to perform a PATCH request of an action via SAP Build Process Automation
we get the error: "CSRF token validation failed". When the action is performed in test modus the CSRF token validation works as it should. How can we get the data from Process Automation into our backend?

entry.title: Need Help on SBPA Concepts Regarding Variables
entry.content:
I'm slowly getting there.  I appreciate all the help and guidance I've been given so far.

For the process I've created, I have an Environment variable that gets passed into the process (more to be added) but I don't want to use a form in the process to gather this information.  I want to create an SAP Build App to get the information from the user and pass it to the Process as it gets executed. 

What I'm unclear about is, since I won't have a form in the Process, is it a good idea to use the Environmental variable to capture the information that's coming from the App or is there a better way to accomplish this?

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be gratefully appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: Post a xlsx file with custom script to s/4hana cloud in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am right now trying to figure out how to post a xlsx file with a custom script to a preliminary billing document in the s/4hana cloud through sap build process automation. I have already looked at the call web service activity best practices and found something for a pdf, which is also working for me. But unfortunately it is not working properly for the xlsx file. I am able to attach a xlsx file there but the uploaded file is always damaged in the S/4Hana System and cannot be openend. That means I receive the 201 created as a response and also can see the file attached to the PBD but can´t open the file then out of the S/4HANA System. When I open the original file, everything works perfectly and the original file is not damaged.  


My custom script looks like the following: 

async function fetchToken() {
    const options = {          
        resolveBodyOnly : false,
        method: 'POST',
        url: 'https://myxxxxxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet',
        headers: {
            'slug': slug,
            'BusinessObjectTypeName': businessObjectTypeName,
            'LinkedSAPObjectKey': linkedSAPObjectKey,
            'Authorization': 'Basic ' + credentials,
            'x-csrf-token' : csrf_token,
                       
        },
        metadataType: irpa_core.enums.request.metadataType.formData,
        metadata:[
        {
            name:'testhochladen.xlsx',
            file: filePath,
            type: 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
        }
        ]
    };
    try {
        const response = await irpa_core.request.call(options);
        return response;  
    } catch (error) {
        const csrfToken = error.response.headers['x-csrf-token'];
        return error;
    }
}
let response = await fetchToken();
return response.body;


When I try to send the file with Postman it works perfectly and as I said a pdf is also working. I changed the type to the mimetype of an xlsx file but it is still not working. I also added the Content-Type header to also have the mimetype there once again but the result is always the same. 

Do you guys have any advice on how I could proceed or what might be my mistake?

entry.title: Outlook SDK in the SAP build Process automation the step using Get Mail Body (Outlook) not working
entry.content:
Hi All , I am trying to use Outlook SDK in the SAP build Process automation the step using Get Mail Body (Outlook) , however we are getting the below error message  :

{
    "type": "automationActivity",
    "name": "irpa_core.log",
    "label": "Log Email Body",
    "inputs": [
        "The Body of this Email conatins: undefined",
        {
            "key": "Info",
            "value": 0
 
Where as i am able to read the subject
Thanks,
Vijaya

entry.title: SAP BPA Error Happening in Monitoring - Requesting help!
entry.content:
I have a BPA that has an Automation (AutomatePipeline) with 3 inputs:  InputPeriodName, InputStageType and InputScheduledDate. The Process that starts everything has 3 Process Inputs:  Period Name, Scheduled Date and StageType.

When I am in the Editable version and test the Automation, it completes successfully.

However, when I Release and Deploy the Process and then run it in Monitoring, this is what I've tried passing the JSON 2 ways.

1. 

{
"InputPeriodName": "June 2022",
"InputStageType": "CompensateAndPay",
"InputScheduledDate": "none"
}

2.

{
"Period Name": "June 2022",
"StageType": "CompensateAndPay",
"ScheduledDate": "none"
}

It doesn't matter which one I use, I get the following error when I run it in Monitoring:

"AutomatePipeline" failed

The activity 'automation_automatePipeline_1' cannot be started since the input is not correct: [[] The object must have a property whose name is "InputPeriodName".],[[] The object must have a property whose name is "InputStageType".],[[] The object must have a property whose name is "InputScheduledDate".]

 

Since I know that AutomatePipeline does, in fact, have InputPeriodName, InputScheduledDate and InputStageType as Inputs, I'm confused as to what this error means. 

Any ideas and/or suggestions are most welcome.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Sap Build process automation Actions output Map
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm trying to extract one ouput of action as string. 

Currently the result of the API is an object. I need only a string from this output. How to manage that ? 

Regards,

 

Safee
